commit_scope: Move the Form-native text summary source-reader floor from planned route and stream coordinates to ready source-data receipts carried by native kernel-http response bodies and .fkb channel cursor windows.

commands: coord claim "summary route stream physical receipts"

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/branch-choice-order.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt-learning.fk form-stdlib/oracle-catalog.fk form-stdlib/cell-log-store.fk form-stdlib/kernel-http.fk form-stdlib/channel.fk form-stdlib/text-summary-learning.fk form-stdlib/tests/text-summary-multi-source-band.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/branch-choice-order.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt-learning.fk form-stdlib/oracle-catalog.fk form-stdlib/text-summary-learning.fk form-stdlib/tests/text-summary-real-source-band.fk

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt.fk form-stdlib/branch-choice-order.fk form-stdlib/choice-receipt-learning.fk form-stdlib/oracle-catalog.fk form-stdlib/text-summary-learning.fk form-stdlib/tests/text-summary-learning-band.fk
local_validation.notes: Prompt guide and wellness passed before editing. The focused text-summary-multi-source-band returned 65535 as a 3-kernel only host-I/O/value proof: it reads a real checked-in file slice, writes and reads a real segmented cell-log-store value, lowers a kernel-http route choice into a kh-response body receipt, writes and reads a .fkb channel cursor window through channel-read-since, and aggregates all four ready source-data receipts into one summary CHOICE-RECEIPT. Existing real-source remains 8191. Existing text-summary-learning remains 262143 with fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed yet; CI not run at evidence creation time.

deploy_validation.summary: Local Form proof and docs only. Public deployment is checked after merge by the deploy verifier.

phase_gate.gate: Cells and recipes can discover and learn from file, store, route, and stream source receipts without Python carriers or ambient host access.
phase_gate.next: Move kernel:route from native kh-response body receipts to socket-served front-door traces, and move stream:read from .fkb cursor windows to backpressure-aware event streams.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Form now exposes ready source-data receipts for kernel:route and stream:read summary inputs. Route receipts are gated by status/header/body data from native kernel-http response values; stream receipts are gated by ordered payloads and cursor counts from .fkb channel-read-since windows.
test_flows: text:summarize-route plans through kernel:route with cap.kernel.route.read and kernel-http:kh-response-body.
text:summarize-stream plans through stream:read with cap.stream.read and channel:read-since+cursor-window.

The multi-source proof reads file and store sources, computes a kernel-http route choice and kh-response body, reads a .fkb channel cursor window, and learns only from receipts that pass byte, claim, citation, status, header, event, and cursor gates.
The proof remains honest about the next gap: route is not yet a socket-served front-door trace and stream is not yet a backpressure-aware native event stream.
e2e_validation.summary: This moves route and stream out of placeholder/planned status into physically evaluated native Form value and file-backed channel receipts while preserving the next north-star pressure explicitly.
